Please use the latest version of the data for the desired date, keeping in mind that different cities update their reports at different frequencies.

Not all weather data is the same. While checking a source like AccuWeather or Google Weather may help guide your decision, the official and final value used to determine this market is the maximum/minimum temperature as reported by the corresponding NWS Climatological Report (Daily) linked in the rules above. Preliminary NWS reporting and measurement methods may be subject to underlying rounding and conversion nuances. Traders should exercise caution when interpreting preliminary NWS data.
title: Low Temperature Oklahoma City

rules_primary: If any span of 4 consecutive calendar days after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2029 contains at least 2 days where the Station Average at Dallas Fort Worth International Airport (DFW) and George Bush Intercontinental Airport, Houston (IAH) is below 20°F, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
A "Qualifying Day" is a calendar day after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2029 for which the applicable Station Test is met. The Station Test is whether the Station Average for the calendar day is below 20.

A calendar day is after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2029 if the calendar date of that day, as used in the Source Agency's climatological records for the Reference Stations, falls after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2029. 

The Qualifying Days within that span need not be consecutive, and Qualifying Days occurring outside that span do not affect the determination.

The Station Average is calculated for any calendar day as the arithmetic mean of the Daily Minimum Temperatures for all Reference Stations for that calendar day, computed in degrees Fahrenheit and truncated to one decimal place.

The Daily Minimum Temperature is the minimum temperature, in degrees Fahrenheit (unless otherwise specified), for a Reference Station for a calendar day, as documented by the Source Agency in its daily or monthly climatological records for that station, using the calendar-day boundaries applied by the Source Agency in those records. If the Source Agency corrects a documented value prior to Expiration, the corrected value shall be used.
title: Will the average temperature in Texas (DFW & IAH) fall below 20°F for at least 2 days within a 4-day span?

rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Austin, TX for Jul 22, 2026 10 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KAUS), is above 97.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
title: Hourly Directional Austin Temperature
